name: &BThe Temple of the Orcs&n
description:
It seems quite difficult to believe that in the underworld, where
even for the insects it is difficult to live, life exists. You are
standing in the Temple of Orcs, the most horrible race in Wardome.
There is manny paintings in the walls, you cannot realize who is their
god, or who is their chief.
   The exit to the Temple Street is to the South.
